name: Regression/ms-operation-versions
description: Content-negotiation conformance for the Microsoft-proprietary '$versions' operation (from OperationVersionsTests.cs): valid Accept headers return 200 with a matching Content-Type, a missing Accept defaults to JSON, and an invalid Accept returns 406. All assertions are warningOnly since '$versions' isn't part of core FHIR and may 404 if unimplemented.

test.name: $versions honors a valid JSON Accept header
test.description: GET $versions with Accept: application/fhir+json should return 200 with a matching Content-Type (also covers the 'application/json' alias); warningOnly since $versions is proprietary.

assert.description: Server should return HTTP 200 (warningOnly: operation may be unimplemented)
Response Content-Type should echo 'application/fhir+json' exactly (warningOnly, see above)

test.name: $versions honors a valid XML Accept header
test.description: GET $versions with Accept: application/fhir+xml should return 200 with a matching Content-Type (also covers the 'application/xml' alias); warningOnly since $versions is proprietary and XML support is optional.

assert.description: Server should return HTTP 200 (warningOnly: operation and/or XML format may be unimplemented)
Response Content-Type should echo 'application/fhir+xml' exactly (warningOnly, see above)

test.name: $versions with no Accept header defaults to application/fhir+json
test.description: GET $versions with no Accept header should default to Content-Type application/fhir+json; warningOnly since $versions is proprietary.

assert.description: Server should return HTTP 200 (warningOnly: operation may be unimplemented)
Response Content-Type should default to application/fhir+json (warningOnly, see above)

test.name: $versions rejects an invalid Accept header with 406
test.description: GET $versions with a malformed Accept header (e.g. 'application/json1') should return 406 Not Acceptable (also covers the typo'd 'applicaiton/xml' value); warningOnly since $versions is proprietary and may 404 instead if unimplemented.

operation.description: GET /$versions with an invalid Accept header value

assert.description: Server should return HTTP 406 Not Acceptable (warningOnly: operation may be unimplemented, or may 404 instead)
